claim_text: Joe Biden is unexpectedly leading in early vote counts in Kentucky, potentially challenging Donald Trump's expected win.
sample_post_texts:
New @MasonDixonPoll out today on #Kentucky in the 2020 presidential race shows @realDonaldTrump 56% v. @JoeBiden 39%. 

#Trump's 17-point margin is a landslide, but that is almost half compared to the 30-point 2016 win in the Bluegrass State v. @HillaryClinton (62.5% v. 32.7%). https://t.co/IQxgfV7j1k
Looks like #trump is winning #Kentucky with over 70% votes counted. #ElectionDay #Election2020

.@JoeBiden only leads @realDonaldTrump in the #Louisville area 55%-41%; among registered @KyDems 67%-31%; and voters age 35 and younger 53%-39%, according to @MasonDixonPoll. 

Just 5% of @KYGOP are voting for Biden.

50% of #Kentucky independents are for #Trump v. 39% for Biden.

According to @BBCNews #Kentucky is 51% for #Trump
